adapterRun.summary: Gateway smoke test design is blocked by missing repository context.
notes: Inspected the declared Synapse context files and repository root.
Confirmed the target path `gateway/` does not exist in this checkout.
Confirmed `package.json` does not define the required verify command `npm run ci:gateway`.
Did not add or update gateway unit tests because there is no gateway code or runnable gateway CI target in this repository.

errors.message: The claimed target files reference `gateway`, but no `gateway/` directory exists in this repository checkout.
The required verification command `npm run ci:gateway` is not defined in `package.json`, so gateway smoke tests cannot be validated here.
